name: @luarizer-examples/business-scripting-engine
description: Illustrative business rules engine: mock domain APIs, domain events, and per-workflow Lua via host-surface.

scripts.generate:defs: luarizer generate-defs --surface src/businessSurface.ts --header-note "LuaLS stub for lua/workflows (Zod surface — businessSurface.ts)"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @luarizer/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @luarizer/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @luarizer/luarizer run build && pnpm run generate:defs
scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @luarizer/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @luarizer/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @luarizer/luarizer run build && pnpm run generate:defs
